snippet.title: Aadu 3 Official Trailer | Jayasurya | Midhun Manuel Thomas |Vijay Babu & Venu Kunnappilly| Vinayakan
snippet.description:
Aadu -3 , In Theatres Worldwide from 19th March 2026! 

Cast : Jayasurya, Vijay Babu, Sunny Wayne, Vinyakan, Saiju Kurup, Dharmajan, Harikrishnan, Bhagath Manuel, etc.

snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander.

Aaya Sher

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |

Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

snippet.title: #RńÄKńÄSńÄ Teaser | Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika | Manasa Sharma | Niharika Konidela | Zee Studios
snippet.description:
Watch the official #RaakaasaaTeaser now! A fantasy-comedy starring Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika. #RńĀkńĀsńĀ In Cinemas April 3, 2026 ūüí•
‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶
Rakasa (formerly #PEP2) is a fantasy-comedy film from Pink Elephant Pictures, produced by Niharika Konidela and Zee Studios, directed by Manasa Sharma. Blending imaginative fantasy with engaging humour for audiences of all ages.

Featuring a fresh and exciting pairing of Sangeeth Shobhan and Nayan Sarika in the lead roles, Vennela Kishore, Brahmaji, Tanikella Bharani, Ashish Vidyarthi, Getup Srinu, Sukhwinder Singh, Anoop Singh, Vasu Inturi, Rohini, Rohan Roy.

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | QUARTER FINALS | Day 4
snippet.description:
The Quarter Finals of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens as qualified teams step into a stage where every match carries heavier consequences. Consistency, composure, and calculated aggression will define who moves forward.

From The Grind to Round 4, the journey has built up to this moment. Now the margin for error gets thinner.

Watch the Quarter Finals unfold and see who takes the next step toward the Finals.

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #KraftonIndiaEsports #KIE #BGMI

snippet.description:
"iMRAVii Trailer - Ravi, an ordinary man caught in extraordinary situations.
The story explores the complex relationship between Ravi, the police, and the common public.
Each episode reflects the silent struggles faced by everyday people in a system full of power and pressure.Ravi becomes a voice for those who are often ignored and misunderstood.
The police are shown not just as authority, but as humans battling their own conflicts.
Society‚Äôs judgment, fear, and hope shape every turning point in the narrative.
The series blends realism with emotional storytelling.

Raw performances and gripping moments keep the audience engaged.
*iMRAVii* is a mirror to today‚Äôs society, where every choice has consequences.

en.title: iMRAVii Telugu Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
en.description:
"iMRAVii Trailer - Ravi, an ordinary man caught in extraordinary situations.
The story explores the complex relationship between Ravi, the police, and the common public.
Each episode reflects the silent struggles faced by everyday people in a system full of power and pressure.Ravi becomes a voice for those who are often ignored and misunderstood.
The police are shown not just as authority, but as humans battling their own conflicts.
Society‚Äôs judgment, fear, and hope shape every turning point in the narrative.
The series blends realism with emotional storytelling.
It questions justice, morality, and truth in modern times.
Raw performances and gripping moments keep the audience engaged.
*iMRAVii* is a mirror to today‚Äôs society, where every choice has consequences.

ŗīįŗīĶŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶčŗī≤ŗĶÄŗīłŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶäŗī§ŗĶĀŗīúŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī§ŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗī≥ŗĶćŗī≥ ŗīłŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗĶÄŗĶľŗī£ŗĶćŗī£ŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗī¨ŗī®ŗĶćŗīßŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶÜŗīĮŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć ŗīēŗī• ŗī™ŗīįŗĶćŗīĮŗīĶŗĶáŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗī£ŗīā ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗĶć.

ŗīÖŗīßŗīŅŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗīłŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗĶľŗī¶ŗĶćŗī¶ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā ŗī®ŗīŅŗīĪŗīěŗĶćŗīě ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīĶŗĶćŗīĮŗīĶŗīłŗĶćŗī•ŗīĮŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī¶ŗĶąŗī®ŗīāŗī¶ŗīŅŗī® ŗīÜŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶĺ ŗī®ŗĶáŗīįŗīŅŗīüŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗī®ŗīŅŗī∂ŗī¨ŗĶćŗī¶ ŗī™ŗĶčŗīįŗīĺŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶÜŗīĮŗīĺŗī£ŗĶć ŗīďŗīįŗĶč ŗīéŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗīŅŗīłŗĶčŗī°ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī§ŗīŅŗīęŗī≤ŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗĶć. ŗī™ŗī≤ŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶčŗīīŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗīĶŗīóŗī£ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗī§ŗĶÜŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅŗī¶ŗĶćŗīßŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīĶŗīįŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗī∂ŗī¨ŗĶćŗī¶ŗīģŗīĺŗīĮŗīŅ ŗīįŗīĶŗīŅ ŗīģŗīĺŗīĪŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ.

ŗī™ŗĶčŗī≤ŗĶÄŗīłŗīŅŗī®ŗĶÜ ŗīÖŗīßŗīŅŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗīŅŗīĮŗīĺŗīĮŗīŅ ŗīģŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīģŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤, ŗīłŗĶćŗīĶŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗīā ŗīłŗīāŗīėŗĶľŗī∑ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīģŗīĺŗīĮŗīŅ ŗī™ŗĶčŗīįŗīĺŗīüŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīģŗī®ŗĶĀŗī∑ŗĶćŗīĮŗīįŗīĺŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīēŗīĺŗī£ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ.

ŗīłŗīģŗĶāŗīĻŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶÜ ŗīĶŗīŅŗīßŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗīĮŗīā, ŗī≠ŗīĮŗīā, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī§ŗĶÄŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīŅŗīĶ ŗīÜŗīĖŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī®ŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶÜ ŗīďŗīįŗĶč ŗīĶŗīīŗīŅŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗīįŗīŅŗīĶŗīŅŗī®ŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīįŗĶāŗī™ŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ.

ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗī¶ŗĶÄŗī™ŗĶć ŗīłŗīĺŗīóŗĶľ

ŗīģŗĶáŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶć:
ŗīÖŗīěŗĶćŗīúŗĶĽ ŗīģŗĶáŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶčŗīĶŗĶľ [ ŗīöŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀ]

ŗīģŗĶáŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶć ŗīÖŗīłŗīŅŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć:

ŗī°ŗīŅ:

ŗīłŗĶóŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗĶć ŗīéŗīěŗĶćŗīöŗīŅŗī®ŗĶÄŗīĮŗĶľ :
ŗīĶŗīŅŗīúŗīĮŗĶć

ŗīüŗĶąŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīÜŗī®ŗīŅŗīģŗĶáŗī∑ŗĶĽ:
ŗ§čŗī∑ŗīŅ

ŗīéŗīēŗĶćŗīłŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗĶāŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶÄŗīĶŗĶć ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶäŗī°ŗĶćŗīĮŗĶāŗīłŗĶľ
ŗī≠ŗīóŗī§ŗĶć, ŗīįŗī£ŗīßŗĶÄŗĶľ

ŗīéŗīēŗĶćŗīłŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗĶāŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶÄŗīĶŗĶć ŗīģŗīĺŗī®ŗĶáŗīúŗĶľ:

ŗī¨ŗīŅŗīüŗīŅŗīéŗīłŗĶć:

ŗī∂ŗĶćŗīįŗĶÄŗīßŗĶľ

ŗīłŗī¨ŗĶćŗīüŗĶąŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶĺ:

ŗī≤ŗĶäŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶáŗī∑ŗī®ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶĺ:
ŗīüŗĶćŗīįŗīĺŗĶĽŗīłŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗīłŗīŅŗīęŗīŅŗīēŗĶć ŗīáŗīģŗīŅŗīóŗĶćŗīįŗĶáŗī∑ŗĶĽ ŗīłŗĶľŗīĶŗĶÄŗīłŗīłŗĶć
ŗīÜŗīįŗĶč ŗīÜŗī®ŗīŅŗīģŗĶáŗī∑ŗī®ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶĺ

ŗīģŗīĺŗī®ŗĶáŗīúŗĶľ:
ŗī¶ŗĶáŗīĶ
ŗī¨ŗī£ŗĶćŗī£ŗīŅ

ŗī§ŗĶáŗīúŗĶć ŗīēŗĶćŗīįŗīŅŗīĮŗĶáŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶÄŗīĶŗĶć ŗīĶŗĶľŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶćŗīłŗĶć ŗīéŗĶĹŗīéŗĶĹŗī™ŗīŅ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīöŗī§ŗĶć

bn.description:
"iMRAVii ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į - ŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņ, ŗ¶Öŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶üŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶™ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ŗ•§

ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņ, ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶£ ŗ¶úŗ¶®ŗ¶óŗ¶£ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶ģŗ¶ßŗßćŗ¶Įŗßá ŗ¶úŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∑ŗ¶£ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§

ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¨ ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗ¶ģŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗßá ŗ¶≠ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶¨ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶¶ŗßąŗ¶®ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶® ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗßÄŗ¶įŗ¶¨ ŗ¶łŗ¶āŗ¶óŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ęŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗ¶£ŗßćŗ¶†ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶į ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶ďŗ¶†ŗßá ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶∂ŗ¶á ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶≠ŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶¨ŗßčŗ¶Ěŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßĀŗ¶Ěŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ•§

ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶§ŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶¨ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶®ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗ¶ā ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶¨ ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶≤ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶á ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßč ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ•§

ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į, ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶Üŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ģŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶įŗßāŗ¶™ ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ•§

ŗ¶ßŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶¨ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶óŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶£ ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶•ŗßá ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§

ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į, ŗ¶®ŗßąŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶łŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶®ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ß ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßáŗ•§

id.title: iMRAVii Trailer Telugu || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Karya Kreatif Tej
id.description:
Trailer iMRAVii - Ravi, seorang pria biasa yang terjebak dalam situasi luar biasa.
Kisah ini mengeksplorasi hubungan kompleks antara Ravi, polisi, dan masyarakat umum.
Setiap episode mencerminkan perjuangan diam-diam yang dihadapi oleh orang-orang biasa dalam sistem yang penuh kekuasaan dan tekanan. Ravi menjadi suara bagi mereka yang sering diabaikan dan disalahpahami.
Polisi ditampilkan bukan hanya sebagai otoritas, tetapi sebagai manusia yang berjuang melawan konflik mereka sendiri.
Penilaian, ketakutan, dan harapan masyarakat membentuk setiap titik balik dalam narasi.
Serial ini memadukan realisme dengan penceritaan emosional.
Serial ini mempertanyakan keadilan, moralitas, dan kebenaran di zaman modern.
Penampilan yang lugas dan momen-momen menegangkan membuat penonton tetap terlibat.
*iMRAVii* adalah cermin bagi masyarakat saat ini, di mana setiap pilihan memiliki konsekuensi.

de-DE.title: iMRAVii Telugu Trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creative Works
de-DE.description:
iMRAVii Trailer ‚Äď Ravi, ein ganz normaler Mann, ger√§t in au√üergew√∂hnliche Situationen. Die Geschichte beleuchtet die komplexe Beziehung zwischen Ravi, der Polizei und der √Ėffentlichkeit. Jede Folge spiegelt den stillen Kampf wider, den Menschen im Alltag in einem System voller Macht und Druck ausfechten. Ravi wird zur Stimme derer, die oft ignoriert und missverstanden werden. Die Polizei wird nicht nur als Autorit√§t dargestellt, sondern auch als Mensch, der mit seinen eigenen Konflikten ringt. Gesellschaftliche Urteile, √Ąngste und Hoffnungen pr√§gen jeden Wendepunkt der Handlung. Die Serie verbindet Realismus mit emotionalem Storytelling. Sie hinterfragt Gerechtigkeit, Moral und Wahrheit in der heutigen Zeit. Authentische Darbietungen und packende Momente fesseln die Zuschauer. *iMRAVii* ist ein Spiegelbild der heutigen Gesellschaft, in der jede Entscheidung Konsequenzen hat.

Besetzung:
Doraa Sai Tejaa

nl-NL.title: iMRAVIi Telugu-trailer || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Creatieve Werken
nl-NL.description:
"iMRAVii Trailer - Ravi, een gewone man die in buitengewone situaties terechtkomt.
Het verhaal onderzoekt de complexe relatie tussen Ravi, de politie en het gewone publiek.
Elke aflevering weerspiegelt de stille strijd van gewone mensen in een systeem vol macht en druk. Ravi wordt een stem voor degenen die vaak genegeerd en verkeerd begrepen worden.
De politie wordt niet alleen als autoriteit getoond, maar ook als mensen die hun eigen conflicten bestrijden.
Het oordeel, de angst en de hoop van de maatschappij bepalen elk keerpunt in het verhaal.
De serie combineert realisme met emotionele verhalen.
Het stelt vragen over rechtvaardigheid, moraliteit en waarheid in de moderne tijd.
Rauwe acteerprestaties en aangrijpende momenten houden het publiek geboeid.
*iMRAVii* is een spiegel van de hedendaagse maatschappij, waar elke keuze gevolgen heeft.

it.title: Trailer di iMRAVii Telugu || Doraa Sai Tejaa || Sri Vani || Kiran Macha || Tej Lavori Creativi
it.description:
Trailer di iMRAVii - Ravi, un uomo comune coinvolto in situazioni straordinarie.
La storia esplora la complessa relazione tra Ravi, la polizia e la gente comune.
Ogni episodio riflette le lotte silenziose affrontate dalle persone comuni in un sistema pieno di potere e pressione. Ravi diventa la voce di coloro che vengono spesso ignorati e incompresi.
La polizia non viene mostrata solo come autorit√†, ma come esseri umani che combattono i propri conflitti.
Il giudizio, la paura e la speranza della societ√† plasmano ogni punto di svolta della narrazione.
La serie fonde realismo e narrazione emotiva.
Mette in discussione giustizia, moralit√† e verit√† nei tempi moderni.
Interpretazioni crude e momenti avvincenti mantengono il pubblico coinvolto.
*iMRAVii* √® uno specchio della societ√† odierna, dove ogni scelta ha delle conseguenze.

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Balam Pichkari 8K Full Video | Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani | Pritam | Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika | Holi Song
snippet.description:
Presenting the 8K Full Video Song "Balam Pichkari" from the film "Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani". Starring Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapur & Kalki Koechlin.

Credits:
Song: Balam Pichkari
Music: Pritam Chakraborty
Singer: Vishal Dadlani, Shalmali Kholgade 
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Movie: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani (2013)
Director: Ayan Mukerji
Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Deepika Padukone, Aditya Roy Kapoor, Kalki Koechlin
Music Label: T-Series

Lyrics:
Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi
Mere ang raja, jo tera rang laga
Toh seedhi-saadi chhori sharabi ho gayi

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya

Itna maza, kyun aa raha hai
Tune hawa mein bhaang milaya
Dugna nasha, kyun ho raha hai
Aankhon se meetha tune khilaya

Ho teri malmal ki kurti gulabi ho gayi
Manchali chaal kaise nawaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Teri kalaai hai, haathon mein aayi hai
Maine maroda toh lagti malaai hai

Mehenga padega ye chaska malaai ka
Upvaas karne mein teri bhalaai hai

Ho bindiya teri mehtaabi ho gayi
Dil ke armaanon mein behisaabi ho gayi

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Kyun ‚Äėno-vacancy‚Äô ki, hothon pe gaali hai
Jabki tere dil ka kamra toh khaali hai
(kamra toh khaali hai‚Ä¶)

Mujhko pata hai re
Kya chahata hai tu
Boli bhajan teri
Neeyat Qawwali hai

Zulmi ye haazir-jawaabi ho gayi
Tu toh har taale ki aaj chaabi ho gayi, toh?

Balam pichkari jo tune mujhe maari
Toh seedhi saadi chhori sharaabi ho gayi
Haa, Jeans pahen ke jo tune maara thumka
Toh lattoo padosan ki bhabhi ho gayi (x2)

Haan, bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi
Haan, bole re zamana kharabi ho gayi‚Ä¶

I played a sweet tune with my eyes.

How did your playful gait become royal, then?

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.

Yes, when I was wearing jeans, I slapped him.

You said your prayers.
Your intention is to sing.

snippet.title: Dragon Duke Takes to the Skies! Clash of Clans New Hero Animation
snippet.description:
A ferocious flying Hero breaks free! Red, rebellious, and bursting with rage, Dragon Duke takes flight for Town Hall 15 villages and above!

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļ https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļ https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ‚Ėļ https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

snippet.description:
Where Haryana‚Äôs raw culture meets modern hip hop vibes. Desi swag and next-level energy; this one is made to rule your playlist. Biggest Party Track of the year. This track features Haryana ki Chhorri State level boxing champion Simran Jaglan !

This is not just a song - it‚Äôs a vibe.

Mhare ri mandere pe boliye tateeree

mera pen mera pain meri bandi cocaine

Song - Yaha Ke Bahubali

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SUBSCRIBE 

Lyrics - 
Are gundey ha ji gunday ha 
Ya baat bhi sacchi se 
Pr fan follwing bde stara te bhi acchi se 
Sangeen maamle sir pe 
Beshak umar ya kacchi se 
Mhara baal ni paatya 
Aake mot mandere nachhi se 
Re dedya bde bdya ne jhatke
Dabbe rhe aslya k khatke 
Rakkhi tor bhi sbse hatke
Konya rob pde kam se 
Re hum sher bna de sunna 
Khella khel bi khunnam khunna 
Hoga mizapur ka munna 
Yha ke bahubli hum se 
Re Leader fail kafile agge 
Karfyu mhare aan te lagge 
Bairi dekh ke system bhagge
Aura aaj nhi kam se 

Hum ve sa jinki duniya agge gatha gayi jawegi
Producer Rapiye lawenge ko filam bnayi jawegi 
Re UP aale sukhla ki ju challega karnawliya 
Ar humne maran khattar nyari force bnayi jawegi 
nyari force bnayi jawegi 
Mhari ithas gvahi dega 
Chalda naam dikhai dega 
Aesi yaar tbhai dega 
Janu patya ho kite bam se 
Re hum sher bna de sunna 
Khella khel bi khunnam khunna 
Hoga mizapur ka munna 
Yha ke bahubli hum se 
Re Leader fail kafile agge 
Karfyu mhare aan te lagge 
Bairi dekh ke system bhagge
Aura aaj nhi kam se

Re suthre balak sher sa jigra
Ma ne suthre jame se
Fand ne fukri marniye
Ham rakha kaam te kame se
Are karnawliya amar tera yo
Heera jaan karoda me
Mahare barga ak bhi konya
Ham to madam hame se
Ham to madam hame se
Re jisme batti se do dane
Bana du lule langde kane
Thare cort kacheri thane
Chale aale bhi ham se
Re hum sher bna de sunna 
Khella khel bi khunnam khunna 
Hoga mizapur ka munna 
Yha ke bahubli hum se

Aura aaj nhi kam se

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star Dragon Escape Challenges 1-4 (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star Levels 1 to 4 of the Hero Campaign: Dragon Escape Challenges in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attacks which celebrate the launch of the Dragon Duke Hero. The March Season is Dragon Themed for the Dragon Duke and comes with numerous events, including Free Equipment or Starry Ore on the Supercell Store. Thank you for using code judo to support the channel. Best of luck with your 3 stars!

snippet.title: 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After becoming the first King of the Unstable SMP, I promised to protect my people and my kingdom... and if I don't? Then I'll resign. These are my First 100 Days as King of the Unstable SMP.  

Unstable SMP:
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™ @wemmbumc 
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™ @FlameFragsMC 
‚ěú ‚Ä™   @Spokeishere 
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™ @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @dragon_mc_ @lezywezy @4CVIT @LettuceK 

Original Song by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

FIRST TIME IN S8UL BOOTCAMP | S8UL Bixi OP
Bixi OP Joined S8ul

In this video, I take you on an exclusive tour of the S8UL Gaming House. Watch my first reaction to meeting legends like Mortal, Thug, Goldy Bhai, and the rest of the S8UL family. I also give you a sneak peek of my new PC setup, the streaming room, and the insane vibe of India's biggest esports organization.

This is just the beginning of Bixi OP in S8UL. Make sure to Like, Share, and Subscribe for more vlogs, pranks, and intense BGMI gameplay from the bootcamp! ūüĒ•

snippet.title: Arsenal vs Chelsea SQUAD BUILDER BATTLE ‚ÄĒ FC Mobile London Derby!
snippet.description:
The Takeover Showdown Series is HERE! Episode 1 ‚ÄĒ London Derby. Me vs @VishyFC. Arsenal vs Chelsea. We each get 15 billion coins to build a squad using only past or present club players who played for at least 2 seasons. No tradeables, no training ‚ÄĒ market bought players only. 3 guesses each to sabotage the other squad. 2 protected players each. Then we go Head to Head ‚ÄĒ home leg and away leg. 12 points available across OVR, aggregate, golden boot and clean sheets. All counting towards $1,000 across the full 6 episode series!

jo Ganpati Bappa ke aane se Holi ke rang aur bhi gehre ho jaane ka ehsaas dilata hai ūüĆąūüźė‚ú®

snippet.title: Vanilla Chediye - Video Song | Vaazha 2 | Rajat Prakash | Vipin Das | Savin Sa | Hashir

Song Credits:

Music Composed, Written, Produced and Arranged by Rajat Prakash (Hasmyth)
